name: Lena
review: Way less awkward than apps. I actually met people I wanted to keep talking to.

name: Jonas
review: It felt curated in a good way. Not random, not forced, just easy to be there.

name: Mira
review: Loved that I didn’t have to ask for numbers on the spot. So much less pressure.

name: Alex
review: This was the first dating thing in ages that didn’t feel cringe. Big win.

name: Sara
review: Good people, playful atmosphere, and no weird swipe-game energy. I’d go again.

name: Tobias
review: I expected chaos. It was actually super smooth and surprisingly warm.

name: Nina
review: Honestly? Better vibe than any app date I’ve had in the past year.

name: David
review: The mutual match thing is genius. Takes out all the weird guessing afterward.

name: Kat
review: It felt human. Which is a wild thing to say about dating these days.

name: Maks
review: Small group, real chemistry, no endless texting. Exactly what I wanted.
